name: Coco Eau de Parfum
short: A warm, gourmand eau de parfum weaving coconut, vanilla, and warm spices into a cozy, irresistible signature.
description: Coco is a warm, gourmand eau de parfum that opens with a creamy flash of coconut and bergamot, blooms into a heart of jasmine and warm spices, and settles into a cozy, irresistible base of vanilla, tonka, and sandalwood. Composed at high concentration for a rich, comforting sillage that lasts 10+ hours. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. A scent for cold evenings, warm conversations, and second helpings — the perfume equivalent of a favorite sweater.
benefits: Warm gourmand composition with coconut and vanilla
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A beautiful scent for cooler weather and evenings.

customerReviews.title: Gorgeous
customerReviews.body: Very nice quality perfume with very good fragrance and its feel very good. Perfect for gifting and the size was very good and you can carry it anywhere must have product
